messages.author: Jude
messages.text: Some work on a cross platform client I’m working on for meshcore for Mac OS Linux and winodw. Really rough right now for testing purpose. Getting all the features I want in first. Let me know what you guys want to see

messages.author: Jude
messages.text: Update: Just got messaging working from the client to the node over BLE not serial yet and also you are now able to ping repeaters.

messages.author: Bumblebee
messages.text: Will this client come as a self installer or wil it be a command line install or a script like python, curious minds here. I found the Mrshtastic web app a difficult enough install on linux, with dependencies required, uses podman, which pulls it down.
